description:
Parent epic: V3 E8: Observability standards

Source task 6/7 from MILESTONE_V3.md:

- Add tests that correlation fields are stable across chat, action, control,
  workflow, subagent, handoff, schedule, memory, and compaction events.

Epic closure criteria:
- local Jidoka traces and production telemetry share correlation fields
- observability docs remain standards-friendly and dependency-light

comments.text: Added cross-surface correlation coverage for request/chat, tool/action, controls, workflow, subagent, handoff, schedule, memory, and compaction trace events. Fixed trace normalization so nil upstream correlation values do not become the string "nil", attached compaction events, and added action/control category handling. Verified with focused trace tests plus full format, compile, test, docs, doctor, and diff checks.

title: E8: Add tests that correlation fields are stable across chat, action, control, work...
